creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Created attachment 187199
Patch replaces "-unknown-" with "-portbld-" in the naming scheme of the POCL core files (.bc) and adjust PORTREVISION

The patch replaces "-unknown-" with "-portbld-" in the naming scheme of the POCL core files (.bc) in pkg-plist and adjusts PORTREVISION properly.
